title: component
text: component An executable application module capable of accessing data and processing it in some way. Components are the main executable units of any Uniface application. Different types of component are suited to different types of application and different types of data processing. Related Links Components Uniface application components are interchangeable software modules that handle application processing. They are technology-independent, so compiled components can be run on any operating system. interface A formal description of public features served by a set of objects. A public feature can be an operation, attribute, or an event set. Uniface component A Main Development Object that defines an executable part of an application, including its data structure, behavior, and layout (if applicable). Uniface provides specialized types of components for different purposes, such as server pages for web user interface, and services for back end processing. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
